name: git-explorer
description: Directory scanner with git change explorer

scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); for (const p of ['release','renderer-dist','dist']) { try { fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true}); } catch (e) { console.warn('[clean] skipped', p); } }"
scripts.pack: npm run clean && vite build && electron-builder --win portable
scripts.dist: npm run clean && vite build && electron-builder --win
